title: Spoingly Slimes
description: Slimes, but a bit more goofy.
body:
## For fans of my sona Snences, I bring you Spoingly Slimes!

![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QucKkIqL/images/0e83f482568b3c87824ae7d55b6406de6b68ecc5.png)

This changes the slime textures of both vanilla and a select few mods to resemble Snences, a dark slime with orange eyes. 

There is a bonus datapack to enable some bonus paintings for 1.21 and later versions! Look in the extra files of the 1.21+ version.

Please do not repost the files on other sites, but please do share a link back to this page if you want to show people this pack. If you include parts or edits of this resource pack in your own projects, please do not distribute them without my explicit permission.

Many thanks to my friends who've encouraged me to further make art! We've grown a lot over these past few years :]

Some textures are edited textures from the base game/respective mods, and if owners of the respective projects desire the edited textures to be removed they can contact me on discord `@bobisnotaperson`
